title: News Üsküdar
content:
News Üsküdar

Numbers

Haber Üsküdar is the practice newspaper of the students of the Faculty of Communication, Department of New Media and Journalism. Our students take their first steps into the profession in this newspaper; they experience the process from news gathering and writing to page design. The main goal of the newspaper is to prepare students for the journalism profession in the best way possible and to ensure that they graduate with internalized professional and ethical values. In addition to university news, the newspaper also includes news, interviews and research and analysis articles on other newsworthy topics. Students from other departments of the Faculty of Communication who are interested in journalism can also work as reporters at Haber Üsküdar.
